finding.description: Closer sweep speed too fast — door slams against strike. Does not meet ADA closing-time minimum (5 sec from 90° to 12°).

qa_notes: Measured 3.2 sec with stopwatch; spec requires ≥5 sec. Installer returning 2026-04-17 to adjust.
